# .codex — harness wiring adapter

Generated wiring summary for the `.codex` provider. Do not edit by hand:
change `HARNESS_PROVIDERS` (harness.conf) or the capability table
(`scripts/harness/lib/provider-caps`) and run `bash scripts/harness/sync`.
`sync --check` (CI-gated) fails if this file drifts.

- **Skill stubs:** reads `.agents/skills/` natively — no generated skill stub
- **Agent stubs:** `toml` stubs in `.codex/agents/` from `.harness/agents/`
- **Hook wiring:** `.codex/hooks.json` (nested shape)
- **Execution profile:** adopted — floor validated in `.codex/config.toml`
- **Reads `.agents/skills/` natively:** yes
